---
name: dt-dev-env
description: >
  Use the `dt` conda environment for developing and testing dvc_tools.
  USE FOR: running tests, installing packages, linting, building, or any terminal
  work in the dvc_tools / dvc-tools-anndata / dvc-tools-r workspaces.
---

Always activate the `dt` conda environment before running commands:

```bash
conda activate dt
```

Activate it as the **first command** in every new terminal session — do not skip this step or use absolute paths to executables instead.
